title: Caluori, Janse van Rensburg set for England debuts against Fiji
summary: Teenager Noah Caluori and fellow back Benhard Janse van Rensburg are set to make their England debuts after being named on the bench for Saturday's Nations Championship clash with Fiji.

Image:
                        Noah Caluori (left) and Benhard Janse van Rensburg are set to make their England debuts from the bench

fullArticle:
England head coach Steve Borthwick names three uncapped players on bench to face Fiji in Nations Championship; Noah Caluori, Benhard Janse van Rensburg and George Kloska are set to make their debuts; England are attempting to end a streak of five successive Test defeats

Teenager Noah Caluori and fellow back Benhard Janse van Rensburg are set to make their England debuts after being named on the bench for Saturday's Nations Championship clash with Fiji.

Saracens' 19-year-old rising star Caluori, whose 18 tries made him the joint top try-scorer in the Gallagher Prem this season, comes into Steve Borthwick's matchday squad as Cadan Murley misses out with injury.

The South African-born Janse van Rensburg has this week become eligible to play for England on residency grounds after five years...
